patch.value: Calendar: normalize recurrence exdates by instant + document count-window semantics

Follow-up to pm-0l88 (timezone + all-day shipped 2026-05-31). Two secondary calendar-correctness items remain from that audit: (1) exdates are matched via exact-string Set membership (calendar.ts ~ const excluded = new Set(recurrence.exdates)), so a format mismatch (Z vs +00:00, or differing ms precision) silently fails to exclude an occurrence — normalize both exdates and candidate timestamps through Date.parse->toISOString before comparing. (2) recurrence 'count' counts occurrences from the series start_at, not from the query window start; document this window semantics in the help/contract. Low priority; no current user reports.
